close_reason: Completed: admin-web package build now uses next build --webpack and Nx wrapper delegates to the same script. Evidence: bun run --cwd apps/admin-web build; bun run --cwd apps/admin-web e2e; bun run affected:e2e.
description: Audit evidence: Nx admin-web:build uses tools/run-admin-build-clean-env.mjs and forces next build --webpack, while apps/admin-web package build/e2e preflight runs next build default Turbopack. This verifies two different production build modes and can hide build-specific regressions. Choose one canonical mode or make the dual-mode check explicit.
title: Unify admin-web build path across Nx build and e2e preflight

description: Perform QA/QC audit of base foundation setup: docs alignment, Nx workspace, scripts, CI/CD, testing split, Docker Compose, generated API client, shared-kernel, code quality, performance signals, and operational readiness. Output evidence-backed findings and follow-up recommendations without broad implementation changes.
notes: Audit evidence collected 2026-05-13. Passed: bun run show:projects => 6 projects; bun run workspace:conformance => pass; bun run shared:smoke => OpenAPI export/generate/idempotency/conformance pass; bun run affected => lint/typecheck/test/build pass for 6 projects; bun run affected:e2e => api/admin-web/mobile e2e pass; bun run release:smoke => pass. Gaps found: AGENTS files are mojibake/encoding damaged; release smoke passes despite DB bootstrap failure when Docker daemon unavailable; Docker runtime not verified on this machine; api lint is mutating via --fix; admin-web uses different build modes between Nx build and package/e2e path; mobile lint/test warnings remain; shared-kernel is unused placeholder; starter boilerplate remains in apps; .env.example misses API_BASE_URL and ADMIN_BASE_URL referenced by runbook. Follow-ups created/mapped: delivery-app-udg, delivery-app-fj8, delivery-app-4nw, delivery-app-jw2, delivery-app-eai, delivery-app-9rq, delivery-app-h87.
title: Audit foundation quality and readiness

title: WF-004 Refactor docs/plan governance contracts

verification_commands:
- bun install -> pass
- NX_INTERACTIVE=false bunx nx show projects -> pass (api, admin-web, mobile discoverable)
- NX_INTERACTIVE=false bunx nx show project api --json -> pass
- NX_INTERACTIVE=false bunx nx show project admin-web --json -> pass
- NX_INTERACTIVE=false bunx nx show project mobile --json -> pass
tests: workspace smoke runtime pass
drift_check: aligns with FDN-R01 phase contract and bun package manager invariant
note: initial nx interactive prompt was neutralized by NX_INTERACTIVE=false for deterministic verification
title: FDN-R01-T01 Root Nx workspace runtime scaffold

close_reason: Completed: release smoke now fails DB bootstrap by default and supports explicit RELEASE_SMOKE_MANAGE_DB=false caller-owned mode. Evidence: bun run release:smoke fails on Docker/DB bootstrap; RELEASE_SMOKE_MANAGE_DB=false bun run release:smoke passes.
description: Audit evidence: bun run release:smoke passed even though bun run db:up failed because Docker daemon was unavailable. tools/release-smoke/run-release-smoke.mjs treats db:up as optional by default via tryWorkspaceCommand, so release readiness can be false-green for data-layer runtime. Define explicit modes: fail when DB is required, or document/use RELEASE_SMOKE_MANAGE_DB=false only with a pre-existing verified DB.
title: Make release smoke fail on required DB bootstrap or split DB smoke mode
